title: Breakwave Weekend Read
summary:
Main
As the week comes to a close, take a moment to review the key insights from the past few days. We've gathered all the top insights for you to catch up at your convenience. Optimism Drives Futures Higher As Spot Remains Dormant - The recent uptick in optimism regarding a sharp recovery in spot rates has led to a rise in the futures curve over the past week.
